{/* ASIDE - Misma estructura */}
{sections.map((s) => ( scrollTo(e, s.id)} className={` relative group flex items-center justify-between py-3 px-4 transition-all duration-300 after:content-[''] after:absolute after:left-0 after:bottom-0 after:w-full after:h-px after:bg-[#9298A6] ${ active === s.id ? 'font-semibold opacity-100 after:scale-x-100 bg-[#9298A6]/20' : 'font-extralight opacity-70 hover:opacity-100 after:scale-x-0 hover:after:scale-x-100' } `} >
{s.title}
))}
{/* CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL - Misma estructura */}
{sections.map((section) => (
(sectionRefs.current[section.id] = el)} className="scroll-mt-24" > {/* Contenido de cada sección */}
))}
